brief.speaker: pharaoh
brief.text: My ninth year of reign. Something... a feeling. Show me every entry from year 9.

expected.sql: SELECT overseer, amount FROM granary WHERE year = 9

hints.text: Pharaoh: 'Too many years. I asked for only year nine.'
Pharaoh: 'Not enough. Six scribes logged in year 9. Where are they all?'
Pharaoh: 'The year is a number. Not a text. Remove the quotes.'
Pharaoh: 'Filter the granary to exactly year 9. The integer, not the text.'

success.speaker: pharaoh
success.text: Six entries. Five names I know. And... Hemiunu. I do not know this overseer. A strangely small delivery. Continue.
